ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trips" (
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trip */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the trip in minutes */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date and time the trip started */,
  "start_station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station where the trip started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date and time the trip ended */,
  "end_station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station where the trip ended */,
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bike used for the trip */,
  "subscription_type" TEXT /* Type of subscription the user has (e.g., Subscriber, Customer) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who took the trip */,
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment for the trip */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance traveled during the trip */,
  "route" TEXT /* Route taken during the trip */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user for the trip */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the user for the trip */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_bike_id FOREIGN KEY ("bike_id") REFERENCES bikes ("bike_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_end_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("end_station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_start_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("start_station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the station */,
  "terminal" INTEGER /* Terminal number of the station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the station */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of bikes the station can hold */,
  "current_bike_count" INTEGER /* Current number of bikes at the station */,
  "last_inventory_update" TEXT /* Last time the station inventory was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bikes" (
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bike */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Current condition of the bike (e.g., good, damaged) */,
  "last_maintenance" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the bike */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the bike was manufactured */,
  "current_station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station where the bike is currently located */,
  "last_checkin" TEXT /* Last time the bike was checked in */,
  "maintenance_needed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the bike needs maintenance */,
  "battery_level" REAL /* Battery level of electric bikes (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bike_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bikes_current_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("current_station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "subscription_type" TEXT /* Type of subscription the user has */,
  "zip_code" INTEGER /* Zip code of the user's address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the service */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subscriptions" (
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription plan */,
  "subscription_name" TEXT /* Name of the subscription plan */,
  "price" REAL /* Monthly price of the subscription plan */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the subscription plan (e.g., month, year) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the subscription plan */,
  "benefits" TEXT /* Benefits included in the subscription plan */,
  "cancellation_policy" TEXT /* Cancellation policy for the subscription plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_subscriptions" (
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subscription plan */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the subscription started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the subscription ended (if applicable) */,
  "renewal_date" TEXT /* Date the subscription is due for renewal */,
  "auto_renew" INTEGER /* Indicates if the subscription is set to auto-renew */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the subscription */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the subscription (e.g., active, expired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_id", "user_id")
)
